title: Jordan Stephens questions Piers Morgan approach as Harrison Sullivan HSTikkyTokky interview turns into viral chaos
summary_full: Jordan Stephens criticized Piers Morgan’s interview with Harrison Sullivan, saying it lacked depth and preparation. He believes Sullivan intentionally provoked reactions and Piers fell into that trap. Jordan suggested better questions could have explored Sullivan’s mindset. He also raised concerns about social media algorithms pushing such content to young audiences, calling it the bigger issue behind the controversy.
